fixed_issues: Conducted Forensic Security Audit: Identified and removed phishing triggers (unprofessional AI identity, high-pressure UI warnings, and sensitive OCR document requests without disclaimers)
Removed 'Mr. Bean' identity protocol from advisor_service
Refactored loud 'DEVELOPER TEST MODE' banners into professional Beta/Research disclaimers
Added data privacy notices to Tax OCR and Check Tracker components
Removed hardcoded AUDIT_TOKEN_BERKELEY backdoor from AIAnalyst.js (fetchBrief + handleSend)
Restored full firebase.json (hosting + functions + /api/** rewrites)
Fixed critical 500 error (unpack mismatch) in firestore_db.py and sync_categories.py
Implemented robust authorization fallback in api.py (checks Doc email if JWT lacks claim)
Unified frontend premium state in App.js to prevent 'Free' badge regressions
Removed educational development disclaimers from Layout.js
Successfully redeployed and verified all systems via browser audit
Fixed NameError in auth.py causing 500 errors on Plaid and Category Update endpoints
Moved Custom Categories settings to the Budget Tracker for better intuitiveness
Added success toast to the Dashboard Sync Plaid button
Consolidated Wealth Gap and Debt Spiral into a new unified Visualizations tab
Created CostOfWaiting component to visualize early investing benefits (Age 20 vs 30 vs 40)
Clarified Debt Spiral APR as 'Average Credit Card APR' (24.99%)
Resolved Plaid INVALID_PRODUCT error by removing 'auth' from production product requests
Fixed NameError 'existing_trans_ids' in api.py sync reconciliation logic
Implemented Purge-and-Replace sync logic to remove sold assets (like RDDT) and fix incorrect balances
Added 'Spending Analysis' tab with Month-over-Month comparison and keyword Trends
25: Switched to 'Available Balance' for depository accounts for better real-time accuracy
26: Implemented Robust Deduplication and Check Reconciliation in the Transactions engine
27: Integrated Gemini 1.5 Flash OCR for Tax Documents and Checks
28: Enhanced AI Advisor with Period-over-Period (PoP) insights and persistent habit tracking
